response: <<Maria>> buys <<granola>> bars <<that>> come <<in>> boxes <<of>> 12 <<bars>> per <<box>>, <<with>> each <<bar>> containing <<90>> calories. <<If>> Maria <<has>> already <<eaten>> 3 <<bars>>, <<how>> many <<calories>> are <<remaining>> in <<the>> box? <<The>> answer <<is>> 12 * 90 - 3 * 90 = 1080 - 270 = 810 <<calories>>. <<The>> remaining <<calories>> in <<the>> box <<is>> 810 <<cost>>.
